name: toss-place-fe-superpowers
description: A frontend assignment workflow kit for Toss Place style take-home assignments. It helps with 24-hour timeboxed assignment operation, commerce order-flow auditing, planning feedback loops, product-focused assignment strategy, requirement analysis, assumptions, trade-offs, README rationale, stack selection, cache-efficient Next.js RSC architecture, Simple FSD, API design, component boundaries, React performance review, test quality review, parallel agent orchestration, review-fix loops, feature-sized commits, git delivery, upstream PR safety checks, reliability review, and final polish.

interface.shortDescription: Frontend take-home workflows for Toss Place style reliability and architecture
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first skill pack for frontend take-home assignments, especially Toss Place and offline-commerce-like products. It guides 24-hour timeboxed assignment operation, commerce order-flow auditing, planning feedback loops, product-focused assignment strategy, requirement analysis, assumptions, trade-offs, README rationale writing, stack selection, cache-efficient Next.js RSC architecture, Simple FSD structure, API layer design, re-render-aware component boundaries, React performance best practices, test quality review, Codex subagent orchestration, review-fix loops, feature-sized commits, git delivery, upstream PR safety checks, reliability review, offline edge-case checks, and final submission polish.
defaultPrompt: Audit cart, option, and order flows.
